Generic.1: We know you're staring at this line of text in dismay.
Generic.2: Wouldn't this device be so much more interesting if you didn't know what it did?
Generic.9: Try playing Falling Star with Spoils of Battle in hand!
Generic.10: If you're reading this, it means you can't read.
Generic.12: I wonder if these were randomized...
Generic.13: I bet you really love this mod right now.
Generic.19: Good luck finding the skip option.
Generic.21: What's your favorite art so far?
Generic.22: Make sure you laugh at these funny messages.
TinkerTime.1: Scientific jargon you don't quite understand.
TinkerTime.2: Congratulations on making it to act 3 before dying!
TinkerTime.3: Sorry, but we needed to ensure your run is doomed.
TinkerTime.6: This one's definitely the power... or was it the skill?
TinkerTime.7: Click here to find out what this card is: <rickroll>
Generic.Conditional.Claw.InDeck.1: Claw Claw Claw Claw Claw Claw...
Generic.Conditional.Claw.InDeck.2: I hope you have enough claws.
Generic.Conditional.Claw.InDeck.With2: You don't. There's no such thing as 'enough claws.'
Generic.Conditional.MultipleJuzu: How many juzus do you need anyways?
Generic.Conditional.AnyRelicNotAtMaxCoun: You forgot to set up your relics.
TinkerTime.Conditional.MoreThan4Players: I don't have enough inventions for all of you!
TinkerTime.Conditional.name of the event: Oh no, Rixian got to the Tinker Time event. RUN!
